feat.name: Fake Out
feat.requirement: You're wielding a loaded firearm or crossbow.
feat.text: With a skilled flourish of your weapon, you force an enemy to acknowledge you as a threat. Make an attack roll to Aid the triggering attack. If you dealt damage to that enemy with the same weapon since the start of your last turn, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to this roll.

traits.name: Gunslinger
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the gunslinger class.

traits.name: Visual
traits.text: A visual effect can affect only creatures that can see it. This applies only to visible parts of the effect, as determined by the GM.

feat.trigger: An ally is about to use an action that requires an attack roll, targeting a creature within your weapon's first range increment.

pfs.note: For the purpose of gunslinger feats and abilities, if the ability states that you fire your weapon, you fire your weapon; if it does not state as such, you do not have to fire your weapon. Notably, Fake Out does not require you to actually fire your weapon.
